articles.title: Cardano Whales Devour Dip, Why They Don’t Care About Price Action
articles.description: Despite the crypto market’s bloodshed, in the past few days, the Cardano (ADA) trading activity has been relentless, and its holders’ balance remains strong with a multi-year high. Into The Block data indicates that the wallet balance held by long-term Cardano holders hit a multi-year high on February 23. “Regardless of the price action, Cardano‘s holders remain strong. The balance held by HODLERS- addresses holding >1 year, is at a multi-year high. These HOLDERS increased their positions to 10.
